extractions.problem: Need for user-friendly tools for multimodal single-cell data visualization
extractions.method: Single-Cell Virtual Cytometer software for flow cytometry-like visualization
extractions.finding: Open-source software for cell population definition and UMAP/t-SNE mapping

extractions.problem: Understanding aging effects on CD8 T cell responses to influenza
extractions.method: Comparative analysis of CD8 T cell response in aged versus young mice
extractions.finding: Aged mice CD8 T cell response dominated by memory T cell pool-derived cells

extractions.problem: Quantifying bacterial abundance in cell culture requires high-throughput methods
extractions.method: Virtual Colony Counting for automated bacterial quantification
extractions.finding: VCC enables automated threshold-based bacterial quantification

extractions.problem: 3D organoid cultures require scaffold materials complicating cell interactions
extractions.method: Acoustic virtual scaffold for scaffold-free tumor organoid culture
extractions.finding: Contact-free 3D cell manipulation for organoid-immune cell interactions

extractions.problem: Grid cells represent spatial location during navigation
extractions.method: Direct recording of grid-like neuronal activity in human patients
extractions.finding: Grid cell activity recorded from human brain during navigation

extractions.problem: Virtual screening for compounds targeting SARS-CoV-2 spike protein
extractions.method: Protein-protein docking of host proteases with spike protein
extractions.finding: Phytochemicals bind at active sites of furin and TMPRSS2

extractions.problem: T cell activation requires integration of multiple signals from dendritic cells
extractions.method: Virtual lymph node model for T cell priming dynamics
extractions.finding: T cell priming spans 3-4 days before clonal expansion and egress

extractions.problem: Esophageal squamous cell carcinoma lacks effective therapeutic options
extractions.method: Differential gene expression analysis from TCGA and GEO databases
extractions.finding: Identified potential therapeutic targets in ESCC

extractions.problem: Whole-cell models require parameter estimation for genotype-to-phenotype prediction
extractions.method: DREAM8 Parameter Estimation Challenge for M. genitalium submodels
extractions.finding: 45 researchers from 16 institutions tested parameter estimation methods

extractions.problem: Whole-cell simulations need visualization tools for data exploration
extractions.finding: 14 animated visualizations including metabolic and signaling pathways
